about.title: who am i?
about.p1: i'm walano, a graphic designer specialized in crafting strong visual universes, blending urban aesthetics with modern elegance. my goal is to transform your ideas, emotions and identity into visuals that speak for themselves. every project is handled with precision, because great design isn't just seen, it's felt.

contact.title: contact
contact.sub: describe your project or ask a question directly.
contact.name: your first name
contact.subject: subject
contact.success: message sent. we'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: something went wrong. try again or write directly to contact@walanodesign.com
